AltText: Rain falling on the Beaulieu River creates an abstract pattern of circular ripples.
Title: Beaulieu River Ripples
Description: Rain is great for photography, I think. But photographing in it is a potentially expensive business when you don’t have a waterproof camera, so it’s usually advisable to stick to either photographing rain in the distance, or waiting until just after it has finished raining, which can be just as good. However, it was drizzling just lightly enough here to not worry too much about it, and I couldn’t really say no to these wonderful intersecting circular ripples, could I? They kept me well entertained until the last of the drops had fallen.
